hero.tagline: A portal for Hostopia product, sales, and training content – all in one place.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search for a product, asset, or use case

home.supportedLanguagesSubtitle: Filter assets by the language they were created in—the same list as the Language filter in the Asset Library. Click a language to jump straight to matching resources.
home.ctaLibraryBody: Browse and filter the complete asset collection by product, content type, language, and more.
home.ctaRequestBody: Let us know what materials would help your team sell more effectively. We'll prioritize creating them.

browse.title: Let Us Help You Find What You're Looking For
browse.subtitle: Use this guided experience to quickly surface the right resources in four simple steps.
browse.step1Desc: Choose where your customer is in their journey
browse.step4Desc: Define the task you're working on
browse.viewResultsDesc: See all matching assets, review them online, download them, or refine your filters to narrow the results.
browse.step1Copy: Start from where your customer is in their lifecycle. Explore assets designed to support awareness, evaluation, purchase, and growth.
browse.step2Copy: Explore materials organized by product to quickly access the resources tied to specific solutions.
browse.step3Copy: Quickly jump to the format you need—presentations, documents, videos, or campaign kits.
browse.step4Copy: Find assets based on the task you're trying to complete, from launching campaigns to supporting sales conversations.
browse.noneDescStage: Skip this filter; show assets from any stage.
browse.noneDescProduct: Skip this filter; show assets for any product.
browse.noneDescContent: Skip this filter; show any content format.
browse.noneDescWorkflow: Skip this filter; show assets for any workflow.
browse.tapToSelect: Tap to select. Then click Next.
browse.viewYourResultsDesc: See all matching assets, review them online, download them, or refine your filters to narrow the results.
browse.noAssetsMatch: No assets match. Try fewer or different filters.
browse.clickAssetToView: Click an asset above to view its details here.

ticker.label: The 2026 Hostopia Product Guide is now available in Connects.

footer.tagline: Behind the brands that power small business.
footer.copyright: © {year} Hostopia. Hostopia Connects – internal enablement prototype.

cart.title: My Resources
cart.reviewIntro: This is your briefcase for decks, documents, and videos. Submit the short form to unlock immediate downloads for everything in My Resources.
cart.downloadsAfterForm: Files download right on this page—no email required.
cart.emptyHint: Browse journeys and products first, then use the
cart.emptyHintSuffix: button on any asset detail page to see items here.
cart.unlockDownloadsIntro: We ask for a few details so we know who is engaging with Hostopia content. After you submit, your files are ready to download immediately.
cart.optInLabel: Subscribe to our marketing updates and product news.
cart.submitHint: Add at least one asset to My Resources before continuing.
cart.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
cart.successBody: Use the buttons below to save each file in the language and format you selected.
cart.downloadReadyHint: Click below to save your file.
cart.downloadReadyHintZip: Multiple files are bundled into one ZIP—click below to download everything at once. You can also download individual files from the list.
cart.zipError: Could not build the ZIP file. Try downloading files individually below.
cart.downloadError: Could not download this file. Please try again.

howItWorks.title: How Hostopia Connects Works
howItWorks.metaDescription: Your assets are saved in your briefcase (My Resources). Submit your contact details once, then download your selected files immediately.
howItWorks.headline: Your assets are added to your briefcase—My Resources.
howItWorks.intro: When you're ready, provide your contact details and download your selected assets right away—no waiting for email.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Explore by product journey, content type, or use case. Preview documents when available before adding to My Resources.
howItWorks.step2Desc: On any asset detail page, add the items you want. Review your selection on the My Resources page.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Submit your name, company, and email once. Your files unlock immediately on the My Resources page.
howItWorks.leadCaptureBody: We capture Full Name, Company, and Email—plus an optional marketing opt-in—before downloads begin. This helps us understand which partners and companies are using our enablement content.

featured.title: Featured & What's New
featured.description: Latest and featured assets on Hostopia Connects.
featured.subtitle: The latest and most relevant product, sales, and marketing content. Sorted by most recently updated.

asset.goBackHome: Go back to Hostopia Connects home.
asset.previewUnavailable: This format can’t be previewed in the browser yet. Add the asset to My Resources to request a copy.
asset.previewFileMissingTitle: This file isn’t on the server yet
asset.previewFileMissingBody: The catalog lists this asset, but the HTML file hasn’t been uploaded to Connects. Add the bundle under Assets/HostopiaConnects, run npm run assets:sync-public, and redeploy.
asset.previewPdfToolbarNote: If your browser shows its own PDF controls, that’s separate from Hostopia Connects — we don’t add a Download button in this preview.
asset.previewFooterHint: To obtain files, add to My Resources, then complete the short form on the My Resources page to download.
asset.addChooseDocumentLanguageHint: This HTML bundle includes English, Spanish, German, French, and Brazilian Portuguese in one file. Pick the language you want when you download this asset.
asset.addChooseExportFormatHint: Customize branding in Brand Studio first. PDF and HTML match your on-screen design.
asset.exportFormatHint_pdf: Best for sharing — matches your customized preview.
asset.exportFormatHint_pptx: Legacy export — layout may differ from the HTML preview.
asset.exportFormatHint_docx: Legacy export — layout may differ from the HTML preview.
asset.exportFormatHint_html: Offline HTML bundle with your language and brand settings pinned on open.
asset.previewHint: Use Preview to view the asset in a pop-up. Customize design to apply your logo and brand colors before downloading. Add to My Resources when you want copies.

brandStudio.title: Brand profile
brandStudio.intro: Set your company logo, colors, and typography once. These settings apply live in Customize Design and are baked into PDF and HTML exports.
brandStudio.brandSectionHint: Logo and company name appear in document headers across every slide or page.
brandStudio.colorsSectionHint: Labeled roles make it clear what each color changes. Brand palette is separate from slide background and font color.
brandStudio.colorPrimaryHint: Main brand highlight — headings, icons, links, and key accents.
brandStudio.colorSecondaryHint: Deeper companion tone — dark accents and supporting brand elements.
brandStudio.colorAccent1Hint: Primary accent — call-to-action banners, stat highlights, and emphasis blocks.
brandStudio.colorAccent2Hint: Secondary accent — soft highlights, chips, and supporting color blocks.
brandStudio.colorSlideHint: Canvas / page background color (not the same as font color).
brandStudio.colorTextHint: Default text color for headings and body copy (not the same as slide background).
brandStudio.ctaSectionHint: Add contact links to the bottom chrome of each slide. Enable the fields you want to display.
brandStudio.customizeIntro: Adjust your brand settings on the left and watch the preview update. When you're ready, add the customized asset to My Resources and download as PDF or HTML.
brandStudio.htmlOnly: Brand customization is available for HTML bundles only.
brandStudio.nextStep: Open any HTML asset and choose Customize design, or browse the library to get started.

productList.goBackHome: Go back to Hostopia Connects home.
productList.filteredIntro: Assets below are filtered to this product. From here, reps can open individual assets or add them to My Resources (coming next).
productList.noAssets: We don't have any sample assets wired up for this product yet.

journeyList.notFound: We couldn't find that product journey.
journeyList.goBackHome: Go back to Hostopia Connects home.
journeyList.journeyBuildABrand: Domains, logo design, and business email assets to help customers look credible from day one.
journeyList.journeyGetOnline: SSL, hosting, and website solutions – everything you need to put small businesses on the map.
journeyList.journeyGetFound: Directories, SEO, and reputation management content to drive visibility and reviews.
journeyList.journeyGrowTheirBusiness: Ecommerce, custom sites, and Online Fax to deepen relationships and unlock new revenue.
journeyList.chooseProduct: Choose a product under this journey to see its enablement assets.
journeyList.noProducts: We don't have any products wired up for this journey yet.

search.tryDifferent: Try a different search term or browse by category.

library.title: Asset Library
library.subtitle: Browse, filter, and find the exact sales and marketing assets you need.
library.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your filters or clearing them to see all assets.

highlights.popularDesc: Most viewed assets in the last period.
